summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to a Bloomberg View column about the author's path to becoming a mathematician. The post mentions that dominoes and mathematical proofs played a formative role in her decision. The actual content and arguments are contained in the linked Bloomberg article rather than the blog post itself.
key_points: The author wrote a Bloomberg View column about her journey to mathematics
Dominoes played a role in inspiring her mathematical career
Mathematical proofs can be empowering experiences
key_insight: Mathematical proofs can serve as empowering experiences that inspire people to pursue careers in mathematics.
